What is denatured alcohol?
options: The mixing of colour and methanol to ethanol for the purpose of industrial use /
It is formed when alcohol reacts with oxygen /
The product of ethanol reacting with concentrated sulphuric acid /
The product of alcohol reacting with sodium /

questions.statement: Which of the following orders is correct with respect to increasing pH levels?
options: Egg White &lt; Blood plasma &lt; Caustic Soda 4 percent (NaOH) /
Egg White &lt; Antacid &lt; Caustic Soda 4 percent (NaOH) /

questions.statement: ______&nbsp;solution is a purple dye, which is extracted from lichen, a plant belonging to the division Thallophyta, and is commonly used as an indicator.
Which gas is produced when alcohols react with sodium?
Which of the following has not been concluded by Rutherford from the &alpha;-particle scattering experiment?
options: The atom is indivisible and indestructible. /
Most of the space inside the atom is empty. /
The positive charge of the atom occupies very little space. /
All the positive charge and mass of the atom were concentrated in a very small volume within the atom.&nbsp; /

questions.statement: Identify the Incorrect statement among the following.
options: In froth flotation process for the purification of ore, ore particles float on water as surface is wetted by pine oil /
Silica is used as flux in the metallurgy of iron /
In zone refining method molten zone containing more impurities than original metal /
Zr &amp; Ti are purified by Van Arkle method /

questions.statement:
<p>Choose the correct option to complete the following reaction:</p>

<p>Ca(OH)<sub>2</sub> (aq) + CO<sub>2</sub> (g)&nbsp;&rarr; ________ + H<sub>2</sub>O (I)</p>

<p>Complete the chemical reaction-</p>

<p>Metal carbonate/Metal hydrogencarbonate + Acid&nbsp;&rarr; _______</p>
The increasing order of stability of following free radicals is
options: <span class="math-tex">\((CH_3)_2 \dot CH &lt; (CH_3)_3 \dot C &lt; (C_6H_5)_3 \dot C &lt; (C_6 H_5)_2 \dot CH\)</span> /
<span class="math-tex">\((CH_3)_2 \dot CH &lt; (CH_3)_3 \dot C &lt; (C_6H_5)_2 \dot CH &lt; (C_6 H_5)_3 \dot C\)</span> /

questions.statement: The correct expression for ionization enthalpy of hydrogen atom in terms of Rydberg&rsquo;s constant (R<sub>H</sub>) is:

How many electrons are present in the outermost shell of Silicon?
Which of the following is not a postulate of Dalton&rsquo;s atomic theory?
options: The relative number and kinds of atoms are constant in a given compound. /
All matter is made of very tiny particles called atoms. /
Atoms of a given element are identical in mass and chemical properties. /
Atoms combine in the ratio of small real numbers to form compounds. /
